home.title: Build Faster. Launch Smarter.

features.title: Everything You Need to Launch
features.subtitle: Explore the full feature set of AppTemplate — built with modern web standards and designed for developer productivity and global reach.

getStarted.title: Get Started in Minutes
getStarted.subtitle: Clone, configure, and deploy your multilingual marketing site in minutes. AppTemplate handles routing, translations, and SEO out of the box.

about.title: Why AppTemplate?
about.subtitle: Production-ready from day one
about.description: AppTemplate combines Next.js 14, styled-components, and react-i18next to give you a production-ready multilingual marketing site out of the box.

items.title: Next.js 14
items.text: Static export, Pages Router, optimized for performance and SEO.

items.title: i18n Built-in
items.text: Multi-language support with next-i18next and automatic browser locale detection.

items.title: SEO Optimized
items.text: Meta tags, Open Graph, Twitter Cards, JSON-LD structured data, hreflang, canonical URLs.

items.title: Styled Components
items.text: Full theming system with SSR support, design tokens, and global styles.

items.title: TypeScript
items.text: Fully typed pages and utilities for a better developer experience.

items.title: Static Export
items.text: Deploy anywhere — Vercel, Netlify, GitHub Pages, S3, Cloudflare Pages.

featuredItems.articleTitle: A Modern Stack for Modern Teams
featuredItems.articleText: AppTemplate ships with a carefully selected stack of tools that work well together. Each feature is designed to save you time and help you build better multilingual products faster.

items.title: Locale Routing
items.description: Dynamic [locale] routing with static path generation for every language.

items.title: Theme System
items.description: Design tokens for colors, typography, spacing, shadows, and breakpoints.

items.title: Translations
items.description: JSON-based translations per namespace with automatic language fallback.

items.title: SEO Head
items.description: Full SEO setup with Open Graph, JSON-LD, Twitter Cards, and hreflang.

items.title: Component Library
items.description: Header, Footer, Hero, Cards, Buttons, Modals, Banners — ready to use.

items.title: Static Export
items.description: Build as a static site and deploy to any hosting provider.

items.title: MIT License
items.text: Use AppTemplate in personal and commercial projects with no restrictions.

items.title: TypeScript Ready
items.text: Full TypeScript support across pages and components for a safe developer experience.

items.title: SEO Pack
items.text: Complete SEO setup: meta tags, Open Graph, Twitter Cards, JSON-LD structured data.

items.title: Two Locales
items.text: English and Spanish out of the box. Add more locales in minutes.

items.title: Responsive Design
items.text: Fully responsive layout optimized for mobile, tablet, and desktop.

items.title: Dark Theme
items.text: Beautiful dark theme with a full design token system ready to customize.

promoSection.terms: This template is open source and provided as-is. Customize it for your product.

integrations.sectionSubtitle: Deploy anywhere, integrate with any service

steps.title: Clone
steps.text: Clone the repository to your local machine with git clone.

steps.title: Install
steps.text: Run npm install or pnpm install to set up all dependencies.

steps.title: Configure
steps.text: Update next-i18next.config.js with your locales and add translation files.

steps.title: Deploy
steps.text: Run npm run build and deploy the output to your preferred hosting provider.

securityItems: Static site generation (SSG) for maximum performance
Automatic browser language detection and redirect
Image optimization with Next.js Image component

faq.q: Can I use this with App Router?
faq.a: This template uses Pages Router. You can migrate to App Router with next-intl for a more modern i18n setup.

faq.q: How do I add a new language?
faq.a: Add the locale to next-i18next.config.js and create a new folder under public/locales/ with your translation files.
Yes. AppTemplate is MIT licensed. Use it freely in personal and commercial projects.
Any platform that supports static files: Vercel, Netlify, GitHub Pages, AWS S3, Cloudflare Pages, and more.

getStarted.intro: AppTemplate is designed to get you from zero to a production-ready multilingual site as fast as possible.

sections.title: Project Structure
sections.text: Pages live in src/pages/[locale]/ — one folder per route, automatically served for each language. Translations are in public/locales/[lang]/common.json.

sections.title: Adding Translations
sections.text: Edit the JSON files in public/locales/ to add your own content. The template uses a single common namespace for simplicity.

sections.title: Customizing the Theme
sections.text: Edit src/styles/theme.js to update colors, fonts, spacing, and breakpoints. All components read from the theme via styled-components ThemeProvider.

sections.title: SEO Configuration
sections.text: Update the seo keys in your locale files and replace YOUR_DOMAIN with your actual domain in the page files.

faq.q: How do I change the default language?
faq.a: Update defaultLocale in next-i18next.config.js. The app will redirect users to their browser language automatically.
Yes. Remove the locale from the locales array in next-i18next.config.js and delete the corresponding folder in public/locales/.

faq.q: How do I customize the color theme?
faq.a: Edit src/styles/theme.js. The colors object contains all design tokens used throughout the template.
The default setup uses static export (SSG). Remove output: 'export' from next.config.js to enable SSR.

faq.q: How do I add new pages?
faq.a: Create a new file in src/pages/[locale]/ and add the corresponding translations in your locale JSON files.
